display.purpose: Hero statements and marquee section lines.

headline.purpose: Section anchors and major narrative transitions.

body.purpose: Primary reading copy and supporting explanations.

label.purpose: Micro labels, tags, and interface metadata.

shadows.name: ambient-glow
shadows.value: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 100%, color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-brand-primary) 20%, transparent) 0%, transparent 70%)
shadows.purpose: Warm focus glow behind the CTA panel.

motion.name: ease-expo-standard
motion.purpose: Default deceleration for section transitions and panel swaps.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button and compact control state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion CTA used in navigation and forms.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-brand-primary); color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-brand-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-brand-primary) 50%, white); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary low-emphasis action in the navigation shell.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--color-foreground); border: 1px solid rgba(26,22,18,0.2); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(26,22,18,0.4); background: rgba(26,22,18,0.03); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(26,22,18,0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact live-state indicator with optional pulse dot.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(234,88,12,0.4); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-brand-primary) 8%, transparent); color: var(--color-brand-primary); font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-brand-hover); animation: ds-ping 1.8s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-ping { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: scale(1.35); opacity: 0.55; } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

components.name: Raised Panel Card
components.description: Primary container panel for CTA and feature stages.
components.html:
Your brain called.

It wants help.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: var(--color-surface-raised); color: var(--color-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--color-surface-border); border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: var(--font-display), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 28px); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-panel-body { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.65; color: var(--color-surface-muted); max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Waitlist capture field with brand-tinted focus halo.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: grid; gap: 6px; width: 100%; } .ds-input-label { font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-surface-muted); } .ds-input { width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--color-surface-border); background: var(--color-surface-overlay); color: var(--color-foreground); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-surface-muted); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(26,22,18,0.18); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-brand-primary) 60%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-brand-primary) 18%, transparent); }

components.name: Sticky Stage Navigation
components.description: How It Works tabbed progression rail for Capture, Process, and Act.
components.css: .ds-stage-nav { display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,22,18,0.08); } .ds-stage-btn { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 16px 64px 16px 0; border: 0; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; opacity: 0.42; transition: opacity 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-stage-num { font-family: var(--font-sans), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--color-surface-muted); } .ds-stage-label { font-family: var(--font-display), system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(20px,2.5vw,28px); letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--color-foreground); } .ds-stage-btn:hover { opacity: 0.72; } .ds-stage-btn.is-active { opacity: 1; } .ds-stage-btn.is-active .ds-stage-num { color: var(--color-brand-primary); } .ds-stage-btn.is-active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -1px; height: 2px; background: var(--color-brand-primary); } .ds-stage-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-brand-primary) 45%, transparent); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Flōw uses warm neutrals, intentional whitespace, and one committed vermilion accent to make task triage feel clear and human. It avoids cold enterprise density while preserving production-grade precision in interaction states and hierarchy. The visual direction is optimistic and editorial in rhythm, but operational in function.
keyCharacteristics: Committed vermilion accent on warm cream base
Large display hierarchy with restrained body styles
Flat-by-default surfaces with selective depth cues
Sticky narrative stages for process storytelling
Visible focus and state transitions across controls

rules.name: One Voice Rule
rules.body: Reserve vermilion for intent, including action, active state, and meaningful status.

rules.name: Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: Depth appears only when state or context requires emphasis.

dos: Do apply brand primary to key action and progress states only.
Do keep section spacing generous and rhythm-driven.
Do preserve readable body lines near 65 to 75 characters.
Do use exponential easing curves for transitions.
donts: Don't clone dark mode Vercel or Linear aesthetics.
Don't use gradient text headings or purple glow motifs.
Don't rely on generic equal-card gray grids.
Don't remove visible focus indication from controls.
